creator: spambox@haruhiism.net
text:
Seems like file names were changed and at least tokuft_logprint is now tokudb_logdump.

This is FreeBSD 11.1-STABLE r322835, amd64.

Relevant part of the poudriere log:

=======================<phase: package        >============================
===>  Building package for mariadb102-server-10.2.11
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/mariadb102-server/work/stage/usr/local/bin/tokuft_logprint:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/mariadb102-server/work/stage/usr/local/bin/tokuftdump:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/mariadb102-server/work/stage/usr/local/lib/mysql/plugin/ha_tokudb.so:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/mariadb102-server/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/mysql/README.md:No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/databases/mariadb102-server
=>> Cleaning up wrkdir
===>  Cleaning for mariadb102-server-10.2.11
build of databases/mariadb102-server | mariadb102-server-10.2.11 ended at Fri Dec  8 20:16:23 JST 2017
build time: 00:22:51
!!! build failure encountered !!!

Full log available at https://poudriere.koumakan.jp/data/11amd64-default/2017-12-08_19h53m26s/logs/errors/mariadb102-server-10.2.11.log
